prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HSSADF40IW-STD-WHT-PZ-AMZ Product Type: HOOK_LOOP_FASTENER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: Hanging Strips Self Adhesive Hook and Loop 40 inch Decor Fastener - White Description: Hook and Loop peel and stick rolls. Cheaper than name brand options with just as much tick for tack you may never turn back from our product.

These Hanging Wall Self-Adhesive Strips are great for hanging lightweight objects when you don't want to leave nail and tack marks behind. The strips can easily be removed from any smooth surface and are perfect for short-term decorations.

The white hanging strips are easy to stick to just about any smooth surface. You can cut it into the length that you'll need out of the 40" worth of material provided in each roll. Simply press the strips together and pull back on the strip to reveal the adhesive surface. Small art, frames, mirrors, and more can be secured to the wall without leaving any tacky nail marks behind.

Great for picture frames, remotes, small tools, speakers, surge protectors, and more. Search Terms: home decor wall hanging frames mirrors no marks Features: - Two 40" Hanging Strips - Hook & Loop - Each Strip is 3/4" Wide - Self-Adhesive Backed Tape with hook and loop Material on Front - Cuts Down to Any Length You Need - Great for Attaching Lightweight Objects === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 40 inch White Hook and Loop Hanging Strips

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 40-in White Self Adhesive Hook and Loop Hanging Strips

tokens.name: Self Adhesive Hook and Loop Hanging Strips
